title: [PR] Add local-first AI food diary feature with CLI, rule-based parser, and SQLite persistence
summary:
Implements an end-to-end "enter food diary" workflow designed to run locally on a Raspberry Pi 4 — typed input → rule-based NLP parse → structured SQLite storage → review/edit/confirm loop → CSV export. All parsing is offline-first with optional Ollama and Whisper STT extension points.

title: [PR] fix(agents): accept model `options` in config and safely recover Ollama tool calls (#50894)
summary:
## Summary

- Problem: Users configuring local Ollama models (e.g. Qwen3.5-9B) in `openclaw.json` cannot pass provider-specific options like `num_ctx` — the config validator rejects the key, and even if the schema were relaxed, `applyConfiguredProviderOverrides` drops the field so it never reaches

title: [PR] feat: wire fine-tuned models into app (Sprint 3)
summary:
## Summary

Sprint 3 of the fine-tuned model epic (#124). Wires the trained D4BL models into the application so each LLM call uses the appropriate task-specific model with automatic fallback.
